items.description: New footage has from Spider-Man: Brand New Day has been revealed, including a new look for the wall crawler. The hotly anticipated sequel has already been teased in the first Brand New Day trailer, which finally arrived back in March after several months of s…
items.author: James Hunt

items.title: New Poster: “Spider-Man: Brand New Day”
items.description: Sony Pictures has premiered a new one-sheet for the upcoming “Spider-Man: Brand New Day”. It follows two months on from the first trailer released back in mid-March, though it’s not clear as yet if this is preceding a new trailer drop, as notable poster relea…
items.author: Garth Franklin

items.title: Quick News: Minecraft 2, GTA6, Please, Roman
items.description: A Minecraft Movie 2 Kirsten Dunst has posted the first photo from the set of “A Minecraft Movie 2” in which she stars alongside returnees Jack Black, Jason Momoa, Danielle Brooks, Matt Berry and Jennifer Coolidge. Jared Hess is returning to direct the project…
